protocol.name: wlr_foreign_toplevel_management_unstable_v1

interface.name: zwlr_foreign_toplevel_manager_v1
interface.description: This interface allows a compositor to expose a list of opened toplevels and lets clients request a subset of state changes on them.

request.name: stop
request.description: Indicates that the client no longer wishes to receive events for new toplevels. The compositor will send the finished event afterwards.

event.name: toplevel
event.description: This event introduces a new toplevel handle.

event.name: finished

description.summary: the compositor has finished with the manager

event.description: This event indicates that no more events will be sent for this manager.

interface.name: zwlr_foreign_toplevel_handle_v1
interface.description: A handle for a currently mapped toplevel.
